_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Implement model monitoring dashboards and alerting, including performance degradation thresholds, drift detection, and incident response procedures.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Task AI-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-002 (AB, cosine: 0.526), AB-T-011 (AB, cosine: 0.487).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.528). Shared vocabulary: [monitoring]. NICE-only terms [continuous, prepare, reports] vs WIDAI-only terms [alerting, dashboards, degradation, detection, drift, implement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.884, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 4-word NICE element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (60.5%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Prepare continuous monitoring reports" and "Implement model monitoring dashboards and alerting, including performance degrad". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.530 ≈ STS 0.528 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [monitoring] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.6%. Shared tokens: [monitoring]. NICE-only: [continuous, prepare, reports]. WIDAI-only: [alerting, dashboards, degradation, detection, drift, implement].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 60.5% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
